title: Angel Attack Sequence
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Angel Attack Sequence             Quote Post by Ryukin75 » Sat May 29, 2010 7:57 am Why are Angels who attack out of order? We start with the 3rd, 7th, (?) and finally the 11th? I thought they attacked and were classified in order like in the series?

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat May 29, 2010 8:15 am 11, 12, and 13 will be in 3.0. As for the out of order part, at least they're kind enough not to blatantly skip it. I thought they attacked and were classified in order like in the series?

[]: Re: Angel Attack Sequence [spoilers]             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 29, 2010 9:40 am Ryukin75 wrote: We start with the 3rd, 7th, (?) and finally the 11th?

[]: Re: Angel Attack Sequence [spoilers]             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat May 29, 2010 10:24 am Reichu wrote: (we don't know if there's something special that happened to prompt it)

[]: Re: Angel Attack Sequence [spoilers]             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat May 29, 2010 11:49 am NemZ wrote: Considering a bit of theft was happing at the same time, is it unreasonable to assume that Mr Kaji 'accidentally' turned off a few safeguards then made use of the convenient disruption?

[]: Re: Angel Attack Sequence [spoilers]             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat May 29, 2010 12:08 pm Azathoth wrote: Alternatively...could Mari have been responsible for the Angel's release? Her hax clearly extend to breaking into Nerv/Seele facilities and breaking containment seals on quiescent demigods.

[]: Re: Angel Attack Sequence [spoilers]             Quote Post by bladerj » Sun May 30, 2010 10:44 am SaltyJoe wrote: I'm pretty sure Kaji is the one who is responsible for Mari being able to bypass Nerv's security. Note the clever hint dropping: Kaji can hack Nerv's security, even for the sake of some flirting. Sly one, that Ryoji.

[]: Re: Angel Attack Sequence [spoilers]             Quote Post by yourmom » Sun May 30, 2010 11:12 am NemZ wrote: Considering a bit of theft was happing at the same time, is it unreasonable to assume that Mr Kaji 'accidentally' turned off a few safeguards then made use of the convenient disruption?

[]: Your favorite Angel             Quote Post by Ryukin75 » Mon May 31, 2010 6:54 pm 10th: Zeruel has always been my favorite angel the last battle scene is epic more so in 2.0

[]:             Quote Post by Delular » Tue Jun 01, 2010 6:38 am I always loved the Zuriel fight, both EoTV and RoE. I am saddened that they removed Shinji's 'happy face' while he is trying to rip Zuriel's face off and the grinding of its face against the catapults tracks. Though on 2.22 the drop bear Sahquiel was also a great improvement over the series... The wings things annoyed me though.

[]: Zuriel's face off and the grinding of its face             Quote Post by Ryukin75 » Tue Jun 01, 2010 3:31 pm Delular wrote: I always loved the Zuriel fight, both EoTV and RoE. I am saddened that they removed Shinji's 'happy face' while he is trying to rip Zuriel's face off and the grinding of its face against the catapults tracks.
